name: Bonnie's Truffles
recipeInstructions:
(depends on your taste, I use truffle, Godiva, Kahula or any liquor will do)
Put the chocolate chips and unsalted butter in a blender or food processor. Heat the heavy cream until steaming for about 2 minutes and 30 seconds in the microwave. Turn on the blender or food processor and pour the hot cream over the chocolate and butter. Blend on high speed until creamy and all ingredients are melted. Pour into a bowl and refrigerate until firm. Once set, roll just under a teaspoon of mixture into balls and then roll in chocolate or colored jimmies, coconut, or crushed walnuts. These truffles are very rich and delicious.
